message:
Address review feedback for diagnostic hints

- Change `if` hint from "the result of this expression is `null`" to
  "this will be treated as `false`" since `if` treats non-boolean
  conditions as false
- Change `.primary(x.expr, "is null")` to `.primary(x.expr, "null")`
  for the string-indexed struct null-record diagnostic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,20 +15,20 @@ warning: expected `bool`, but got `null`
 3 |   "false_if_null": false if null,
   |                             ~~~~ 
   |
-  = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
+  = hint: this will be treated as `false`
 
 warning: expected `bool`, but got `null`
  --> tests/language/binop/if.tql:6:27
   |
 6 |   "null_if_null": null if null,
   |                           ~~~~ 
   |
-  = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
+  = hint: this will be treated as `false`
 
 warning: expected `bool`, but got `null`
  --> tests/language/binop/if.tql:9:27
   |
 9 |   "true_if_null": true if null,
   |                           ~~~~ 
   |
-  = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
+  = hint: this will be treated as `false`
